title: Dagger's PokeBadges
description:
This mod adds in named elemental badges.
These badges do not impact gameplay and are intended to be collectibles in your Minecraft world.
body:
![Dagger's PokeBadges](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f22c50158fac1cbe951c4c85c332593030563f9a.png)

### Hey! My name is Dagger and this mod is what i'd consider my first 'substantial' mod.
It was originally created for a private SMP. I thought i'd smoothen it out and add some crafting recipies for it so it would be more survival friendly.
This mod adds in **18 type badges** and **1 Base badge used in crafting these badges!**
The badges do not impact gameplay in anyway and are only meant to be collectibles for your Minecraft world.

## **Crafting**

To make an elemental badge you need a base.
To create a base you need **x1 Iron Block, x4 Iron, x4 Heavy Weighted Pressure Plates**.

![Badge Base](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccac9794a32bca756424dc7e27a076ae97716db.png)

You can the use the base in crafting a type badge.
_(I recommend installing JEI so you can look at the crafting recipes a lot easier)_

## **Conclusions**

I did not make these item textures, they were created by **gray_veyard on Discord** specifically for this project.
This mod is meant to be a bit of fun and for me to get the ropes a little more, but i'd like to think I did alright! Anyone is welcome to download and check it out. All you need is **Fabric on 1.21.1**.
